creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
nivit       2011-05-17 16:45:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/py-greenlet    Makefile distinfo 
  Added files:
    devel/py-greenlet    pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Add -Z to PYDISTUTILS_INSTALLARGS to install the Python egg
    uncompressed. This avoids having to set the variable
    PYTHON_EGG_CACHE at runtime (solution approved by submitter
    via private email).
  - Add pkg-plist
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  - Remove MD5 checksum from distinfo
  - Remove PLIST_FILES
  
  PR:             ports/156220
  Submitted by:   Volodymyr Kostyrko
  Approved by:    Peter Schuller <peter.schuller at infidyne.com> (maintainer timeout > 2 weeks)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.5       +4 -2      ports/devel/py-greenlet/Makefile
  1.4       +0 -1      ports/devel/py-greenlet/distinfo
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/devel/py-greenlet/pkg-plist (new)
